title: afrosciadium harmsianum
intro: Afrosciadium harmsianum, also known as the African celery, is a perennial plant native to Africa, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Afrosciadium harmsianum include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional cooking as a flavoring agent.
